zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll於1465年5月6日出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll31歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Stewart28歲。他和Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。他於1500年登記服兵役。他在蘇格蘭阿吉爾塔波特被列為governor of tarbert castle。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年48歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾蒙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll于1465年5月6日出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll31岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Stewart28岁。他和Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll至少有3个儿子和6个女儿。他于1500年登记服兵役。他在苏格兰阿吉爾塔波特被列为governor of tarbert castle。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年48岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾蒙。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll was born on 6 May 1465, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll, was 31 and his mother, Isabel Elizabeth Stewart, was 28. He had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll. He registered for military service in 1500. His occupation is listed as governor of tarbert castle in Tarbert, Argyll, Scotland. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll est né le 6 mai 1465, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Stewart, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1500. Sa profession de son indiquée est governor of tarbert castle à Tarbert, Argyll, Écosse. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmun, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll am 6. Mai 1465 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll 31 und seine Mutter Isabel Elizabeth Stewart 28. Er hatte mit Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1500 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als governor of tarbert castle in Tarbert, Argyll, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll è nato il il 6 maggio 1465 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Elizabeth Stewart, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1500. La sua occupazione è indicata come governor of tarbert castle nel Tarbert, Argyll, Scotland. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyllが1465年5月6日にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyllは31歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Stewartは28歳であった。彼はLady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyllとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1500年に兵役登録をした。スコットランドアルグイルターバートでの職業はgovernor of tarbert castleと記録されている。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで48歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルキルムンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll(이)가 1465년 5월 6일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Stewart(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 아그이 터아르버트에서 governor of tarbert castle이었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 킬먼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll nasceu em 6 de maio de 1465, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Stewart, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1500. Sua profissão aparece como governor of tarbert castle em Tarbert, Argyll, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll родился 6 мая 1465 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Stewart, 28. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll. В 1500 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии governor of tarbert castle в местности тарбирт, аргилл, Шотландия. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности килмун, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archibald Campbell, 2nd Earl of Argyll nació el 6 de mayo de 1465, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Colin Campbell, 1st Earl of Argyll, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel Elizabeth Stewart, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Lady Elizabeth Stewart Countess of Argyll. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1500. Su ocupación registrada era governor of tarbert castle en Tarbert, Argyll, Scotland. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmun, Argyll, Scotland.
